other options considered:
- When ~ dies, creatures you control get +0/+4 and gain ward {2} until end of turn.

- When ~ dies, your opponents cannot cast spells until the start of your next turn.
- When ~ dies, counter all activated and triggered abilities your opponents control.

- Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
- Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains lifelink until end of turn.

front.name: Snuff, Silence, and Subdue
front.rulesText:
Choose one:
- Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.
- Counter target noncreature spell.
- Suppress 2. (To suppress 2, look at the top two cards of target player's library and choose one. Put that card on top of their library and the rest into their graveyard.)

front.name: Electric Inspiration
front.rulesText:
Choose one:
- Target player creates a pigment token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to activate abilities.")
- Destroy target artifact.
- Draw two cards, then discard a card.

front.name: Experimental Mutation
front.rulesText:
Choose one:
- Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature.
- Move any number of counters from target creature onto another target creature with the same controller.
- Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

front.name: Immolation
front.rulesText:
Choose one:
- ~ deals 1 damage to each creature and each player.
- Target player exiles a card from their hand.
- Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains haste until end of turn.

front.name: Rot, Spoil, and Fester
front.rulesText:
Choose one:
- Mill three cards, then you may return a creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
- Proliferate, then draw a card.
- Target player sacrifices a creature. Create a food token.

front.name: Ferocious Invocation
front.rulesText:
Choose one:
- ~ deals 2 damage to target player.
- Put target land card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control.
- Target creature you control fights target creature an opponent controls.

front.name: Pigment
front.rulesText: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to activate abilities.

front.name: Pilot
front.rulesText: This token saddles Mounts and crews Vehicles as though its power were 2 greater.

front.name: Bird
front.rulesText: Flying

front.name: Spirit
front.rulesText: At the end of your turn, sacrifice this token and lose 2 life.

front.name: Food
front.rulesText: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Gain 2 life.

front.name: Forest
front.rulesText: {T}: Add {G}.

front.name: Clue
front.rulesText: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Gain 2 life.
